サクラ

cherry blossom (katakana)

 あい

love (hiragana)

 食べる

to eat (kanji plus kana, lead byte E9)

 かき

persimmon / oyster (hiragana)

 ケーキ

cake (prolonged sound mark, trail byte BC)

 愛

love (kanji, lead byte E6: expansion escape)

 きゃく

guest (small kana)

 アイス

ice cream (katakana)

 にほん

Japan (hiragana)

 がき

brat (voiced kana, trail byte 8C: expansion escape)

 柿

persimmon (kanji, trail byte 9F)

 さくら

cherry blossom (hiragana)

 す

vinegar (trail byte 99: literal symbol)

 む

archaic verb ending (trail byte 80: literal symbol)
